Convert functions

convert_functions.Rd

These functions convert columns whether that is column names or the values in the columns themeselves.

Usage

convert_nice_name(cols, lookup = nice_name_lookup)

Arguments

cols

column to be converted

lookup

a vector that has the name of the column and the nice looking name of the column e.g., sample_id becomes Sample ID.

On this page
